title: Activity timeline chart in Exercise detail sheet
description: 24-hour timeline showing exercise minutes per hour as bars, heart rate as line, and workout blocks with labels. Per-day mini sparklines in the weekly breakdown.
close_reason: Built lib/activity.ts (pure function, 8 tests), components/ActivityTimeline.tsx (chart), wired into MetricDetailSheet. Shows hourly exercise bars + HR dots + workout blocks.

title: Fix HRV/resting HR export bug
description: share.ts lines 168-169 read .value on HeartRateDaily objects (which have .avg). Export always emits null for HRV and resting HR.
close_reason: Fixed: WeeklyDataMap types corrected, buildDailyExport reads .avg, buildWeeklyStats filters .avg for HRV/resting HR. Added 2 tests.

title: Extract UI components from App.tsx
description: KnownPlacesPanel (7 state vars + CRUD), SettingsModal (tracking + retention), LocationDetailSheet (clustering + export). Removes ~300 lines.
close_reason: Extracted SettingsModal (278 lines) and LocationDetailSheet (470 lines) from App.tsx. App.tsx: 2150 -> 1577 lines.

title: Extract DB helpers to lib/db.ts
description: Move 12 SQLite functions from App.tsx module scope to lib/db.ts. Zero behavior change, removes ~200 lines.
close_reason: Extracted 12 SQLite functions + LocationHistoryItem type + DB_NAME to lib/db.ts. App.tsx reduced by 150 lines.

title: Replace tap-text-to-copy with explicit Copy button on Location card
description: Follow-up to #26. Current UX makes the whole coordinate text tappable, which is a hidden affordance. Replace with an explicit labeled button next to the coordinates so the copy action is discoverable.
close_reason: Inline Copy button added to Location card; shipped via OTA (update group f37d6672)

title: Tap-to-copy current coordinates on main screen (#26)
description: Wire tap on the displayed lat/lng to copy to clipboard with a brief confirmation toast/haptic. Downstream use case: paste into Telegram for Larry.
close_reason: Implemented tap-to-copy on Location card using expo-clipboard; shows 'Copied' for 1.5s

title: Auto-check OTA update on Grab Context
description: When the user taps Grab Context, kick off a background OTA check. If a new update is available, download it silently and show a non-blocking 'Update ready' indicator that the user can tap to reload. Grab itself must not be delayed by the check.

title: Sleep detail sheet Phase 3 — source filtering + layout + day zoom
description: Phase 3 fixes for the sleep metric detail sheet based on user feedback: (1) source tab doesn't filter chart/stats/day list — only swaps a tiny summary; (2) sheet layout puts too much content in the non-scroll pan zone, cramping the day list; (3) clicking a day in the stacked bar is a no-op for sleep; (4) per-night day rows are too small. Spec update first, then code.

title: Add 'Name this place' button on unknown Place N rows
description:
When clustering finds a stay that doesn't match any known place, it's labeled 'Place 1', 'Place 2', etc. User wants to name these quickly from the breakdown UI.

## What to add
- Small button next to each Place N row in PlacesDailyBreakdown
- Tap → prompt for name (default radius 100m)
- Before saving: check distance from stay centroid to every known place. If within existing radius + 50m buffer → offer 'Expand <existing name> to cover this point' instead of creating a duplicate
- If merging: update existing known place's radius to cover both (new radius = distance + 50m buffer, or max of current radius and new distance)
- May need an updateKnownPlace function in lib/db.ts (currently only add/delete)

## Acceptance
- Tap 'Name' on 'Place 3' → modal with name input
- If far from all knowns: creates new known place at centroid
- If near an existing known: offers merge, updates existing place's radius
- After save, Place N disappears from breakdown (now matches the known name)
notes: Sub-task: implement mergePlaceCircle pure function + updateKnownPlace db helper. UI work is separate.

title: Show Transit + Gap rows in per-day places breakdown
description:
Currently PlacesDailyBreakdown only shows stays ≥5min. Users can't tell the difference between 'in transit' and 'no GPS data' time, so a day that reads '8h total' is opaque.

## What to add
- Pass TransitSegment[] into buildPlacesDailySummary alongside stays
- Compute per-day transitMinutes and gapMinutes (gap = dayMinutes − stays − transit)
- Render two extra rows in PlacesDailyBreakdown below the regular places: 'Transit' (cyan) and 'Untracked' (grey, dimmed)
- Today's day uses (now − dayStart) instead of 1440 for the denominator

## Acceptance
- Each day card shows stays + transit + gap accounting that adds to the day's elapsed minutes
- Gap bar is visually distinct from place bars

title: Add location debug JSON export button
description:
Add 'Export Location JSON' button in Location Detail Sheet that dumps the full debugging picture so users can audit why totalTrackedMinutes looks wrong.

## Why
User noticed the day total in the places breakdown doesn't match their mental model — turns out it excludes transit, sub-5-min stays, and GPS gaps. Need a way to see raw inputs + intermediate values + final computed totals so the discrepancy is visible.

## What it should dump
- Clustering thresholds (MIN_STAY_DURATION, STAY_RADIUS, MERGE_GAP, RECENT_DAYS)
- Known places list
- Raw locationHistory points (last 7 days)
- clusterLocationsV2 output (stays[] + transit[])
- Computed placesDailySummary
- Per-day accounting: stayMinutes + transitMinutes + gapMinutes + coveredMinutes so user can see the '24h' vs 'tracked' split

## Acceptance
- Tap button → iOS share sheet with location-debug-{date}.json
- Include all fields above
- Don't include raw point clouds if > 5 days (keep file sane)
close_reason: superseded by two more specific issues

title: Port gym timer feature into context-grabber
description: Clone the gym timer functionality from igor-timer into context-grabber app. Design UX for how to open/access the timer (e.g. dedicated tab, button on main screen, modal, etc.)
design: APPROACH: Share hooks directly from igor-timer, only rewrite audio layer. useTimer.ts, useStopwatch.ts, useSets.ts are pure React hooks - only need window.setInterval→setInterval fix. useAudio.ts gets full rewrite using expo-av (same interface: playStartBeep/playEndBeep/playCountdownBeep/playFinishBeep). UX: Full-screen toggle via header button - isGymTimer state at App root switches between MetricsScreen and GymTimerScreen. Matches existing modal/sheet patterns. Structure: lib/gym/ with shared hooks + RN-specific audio. Components: GymTimerScreen, TimerDisplay, Controls, PresetSelector, BottomNav (rounds/stopwatch/sets tabs). ~1000 lines total addition.
close_reason: Gym timer ported with shared hooks via git submodule. Committed 55032c4.

title: Analyze igor-timer bug logging and plan fixes
description: Review tmp/igor-timer codebase to understand how it logs bugs, identify issues, and create a fix plan
notes: ANALYZED: igor-timer is a well-built PWA (React 18 + Vite). Key bugs found: (1) No React Error Boundary - component crash kills app, (2) Audio resume race condition - playBeep fire-and-forget can skip beeps, (3) Hard-coded 3s audio resume timeout with no user feedback, (4) IndexedDB silent failures in set counter, (5) No input validation on timer settings. Code quality is high overall - TypeScript strict, good test coverage, comprehensive session recording for debugging.

title: Generic MetricDetailSheet extra data
description: Replace sleepBySource/workouts/workoutsByDay props with single MetricExtraData discriminated union. Renderers keyed by type.

title: Metric provider registry
description: Replace fetchDayFromHealthKit switch with per-metric provider files. Each metric exports fetchDay/fetchRange/transform/fetchExtra. Generic weekly data engine calls providers.

title: Location dates and weight in lbs
description: Two changes: (1) Location timestamps now include month+day for unambiguous dates (Fri Mar 29 10:58am-11:11am instead of Fri 10:58am). (2) Weight displayed in lbs everywhere (metric card, summary, export). Both changes deployed via OTA.
close_reason: Implemented and deployed via OTA. formatLocalTime includes month+day, formatTimeRange avoids date repetition for same-day stays, weight shows lbs in card/summary/export.

title: Cache workouts + deduplicate clustering
description: Add workout data to healthCache. Cache clustering result so it runs once per grab, not 3 times.
